content:
MODULE: cosmos.tools.productivity.snippet_manager
FILE: cosmos/tools/productivity/snippet_manager.py (256 lines)
CATEGORY: tools

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Snippet Manager - Code Snippet Storage

"Store your best code once, use it forever!"

Features:
- Multi-language support
- Tagging and categorization
- Fuzzy search
- Template variables
- Clipboard integration

CLASSES:
- Snippet: A reusable code snippet.
  Methods: def render(self, **kwargs) -> str
- SnippetManager: Manage reusable code snippets.
  Methods: def add(self, name: str, code: str, language: str='text', description: str='', tags: List[str]=None,
  Methods: def get(self, snippet_id: str) -> Optional[Snippet]
  Methods: def get_by_name(self, name: str) -> Optional[Snippet]
  Methods: def search(self, query: str) -> List[Snippet]
  Methods: def list_by_language(self, language: str) -> List[Snippet]
  Methods: def list_favorites(self) -> List[Snippet]
  Methods: def list_popular(self, limit: int=10) -> List[Snippet]
  Methods: def toggle_favorite(self, snippet_id: str) -> bool
